title: Make of tgt-fpga directory fails
body:
Make of tgt-fpga directory fails  Numerous errors when compiling xilinx.c, mostly too many argument errors.

I downloaded the iverilog 12 code from github yesterday.  I'm on Ubuntu 20.04.4 LTS with gcc 9.4.0


$ make
gcc -I. -I..  -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Wstrict-prototypes  -g -O2 -MD -c xilinx.c -o xilinx.o
xilinx.c: In function ‘xilinx_cell_buf’:
xilinx.c:29:45: warning: declaration of ‘xlib’ shadows a global declaration [-Wshadow]
   29 | edif_cell_t xilinx_cell_buf(edif_xlibrary_t xlib)
      |                             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~
In file included from xilinx.c:21:
generic.h:25:24: note: shadowed declaration is here
   25 | extern edif_xlibrary_t xlib;
      |                        ^~~~
